news_results.title: Saint steers LYON into lower-bracket semi at LCS Lock-In | Yardbarker
news_results.description: South Korea's Kang "Saint" Seong-in played a starring role as LYON beat Team Liquid 3-1 on Friday in the lower-bracket semifinal of the League Championship Series 2026 Lock-In at Los Angeles · LYON advance to oppose Sentinels in the lower-bracket final on Saturday.
